name: @hazbase/react
description: React toolkit for wallet connection, passkey-native account bootstrap, and sponsored smart-wallet UX built on ethers v6.
author: IndieSquare Inc <info@hazbase.com>

scripts.test: npm run test:wallet-address && npm run test:wallet-link && npm run test:x402
scripts.test:x402: npm run build && tsup src/x402/index.ts --format esm --out-dir .x402-test-dist --clean && X402_TEST_DIST=./.x402-test-dist/index.js node --test test/x402.test.mjs
scripts.test:wallet-address: npm run build && tsup src/wallet/address.ts --format esm --out-dir .wallet-address-test-dist --clean && WALLET_ADDRESS_TEST_DIST=./.wallet-address-test-dist/address.js node --test test/wallet-address.test.mjs
